name: Last Stone Weight
description: You are given an array of integers stones where stones[i] is the weight of the ith stone. We play a game with the stones: on each turn, we choose the heaviest two stones and smash them together. If x == y, both stones are destroyed. If x != y, the stone of weight x is destroyed and the stone of weight y has new weight y - x. At the end, there is at most one stone left. Return its weight, or 0 if there are no stones left.
